description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, deploy, and offline. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory, saves the public/ directory as an artifact, and executes the following script commands in order: export PATH=/usr/local/nvm/versions/node/v8.11.4/bin:$PATH; rm -rf ~/dfak_workspace; mkdir ~/dfak_workspace && cd ~/dfak_workspace; rm -rf ~/.content; dfak init --non-interactive; cd ~/.content/packages; rm -rf dfak; git clone $CI_REPOSITORY_URL dfak; cd dfak; rm -rf node_modules; npm i --unsafe-perm; cd ~/dfak_workspace; dfak config; dfak start --clean --no-watch --baseurl /dfak; mv --force ~/.content/build/@dfak/preview/* ~/.content/build; rm -rf ~/.content/packages/dfak; ln -s $CI_PROJECT_DIR ~/.content/packages/dfak; cd ~/.content/packages/dfak; git checkout -- .; npm i --unsafe-perm; cd ~/dfak_workspace; dfak start --clean --no-watch --baseurl /dfak/@dfak/master; mv --force ~/.content/build/@dfak/preview ~/.content/build/@dfak/master; cd ~; cp -R ~/.content/build $CI_PROJECT_DIR/public; ls -la $CI_PROJECT_DIR/public. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on the build job, runs only on master, and runs: cp -r ./public ${DFAK_DIRECTORY}/deploys/${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}; ln -sfn ${DFAK_DIRECTORY}/deploys/${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} ${DFAK_DIRECTORY}/current. In the offline stage add an offline job that runs only on master, sets LANG=en_US.UTF-8, and runs: cd ${DFAK_DIRECTORY}; wget --restrict-file-names=nocontrol -qmkEpnp https://digitalfirstaid.org || true; cp ./index.html.offline ./digitalfirstaid.org/index.html; mv ./digitalfirstaid.org ./dfak-$(date '+%Y%m%d'); zip -rmq9 ./dfak-offline.zip ./dfak-$(date '+%Y%m%d'); mv ./dfak-offline.zip ./current/.
